name: Podcast Clip Distributor
description: When a new podcast episode lands in your show's RSS, downloads the MP3 to R2, kicks off an AssemblyAI transcript, polls until the transcript is ready, asks GPT-4o for three clip-worthy moments with timestamps, saves the clip metadata to an Airtable production board, and pings the social team in Slack. Replaces a manual clip-picking step in the show pipeline.
